correctness._note: validator-owned via MODEL_PROFILES['MiniMax-M3']; declared here for documentation. FP4's per-element error trips matched_ratio; gate on cosine vs an fp32 swigluoai reference (floor 0.9958 - margin). Plain SiLU scores 0.449 and is rejected.

win_provenance._what_this_is: Provenance of the epilogue, NOT a result of this bundle. These numbers were measured on the pre-override shape (a runtime flashinfer open()-patch, since sandbox-banned). Reproducing them through THIS bundle is what building the GPU base kernel (M1.2) unblocks; the bundle's own GPU path raises until then.
win_provenance.regime: 8xB200 TP4 graphs-ON decode, equal fidelity (GSM8K ~0.94-0.96 vs cutlass 0.98)
win_provenance.measured_on: experiments/minimax_m3/bundle/miner_m3_moe_swigluoai_nvfp4 (the old shape; sglang cutedsl path, sandbox-banned)
